pageContext.name: Toge Inumaki
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Kotobukiya are proud to present the Toge Inumaki ARTFX J scale statue from the TV anime, JUJUTSU KAISEN!  He comes to life in a battle-ready stance. Extra attention was paid to faithfully recreating even his smallest details, such as the texture of his hair and features of his hands. His neck warmer and right arm can be swapped out to pose him with the zipper open.  The design of the base uses the character's signature colors to recreate the atmosphere of the series.
